title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Haribhakti & Co
jsonLd.description:
We at Haribhakti & Co are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!
